name: Rucia of the White Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のルシア
desc: If you control a "White Forest" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or field to the GY; draw 1 card. If this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "White Forest" Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Rucia of the White Forest" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a "White Forest" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or field to the GY; draw 1 card. If this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "White Forest" Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Rucia of the White Forest" once per turn.
eff: If you control a "White Forest" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or field to the GY; draw 1 card. If this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "White Forest" Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Rucia of the White Forest" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
